_doc: Golden VCG vectors — pins run_vcg (winners + Clarke-pivot payments) across Rust (vcg.rs) and WASM (@coproduct/verify recomputeVcg). Lean carries the VCG properties (truthfulness/IR/budget) rather than per-vector evaluation, so VCG is Rust↔WASM golden + Lean-property-proven (see PROOFS.md).

vectors._name: single bidder pays zero (no externality on others)
displacement: winner pays the displaced second value
